info.title: MDM API V3
info.description: Workspace ONE UEM MDM REST API V3

post.summary: New - Executes a command for device by alternate identifier.
post.description: Executes a command for the specified device alternate identifier. Supported commands are SetRecoveryLock (macOS only), DeviceWipe (macOS only).

parameters.name: commandName
parameters.description: The name of the command to execute. Supported command types [SetRecoveryLock, DeviceWipe, CancelPendingWipe].(Required).

parameters.name: searchBy
parameters.description: Search by Alternate Id type [MacAddress, Udid, SerialNumber, ImeiNumber, EasId].(Required).

400.description: 1. {6213: Device is not enrolled.} 2. {5101: Command not found for the input device and command type.} 3. {5102: Command is not supported.} 4. {5287: Either the command request or the password policy is empty for SetRecoveryLock. } 5. {5291: Invalid obliteration behavior value.} 6. {5292: PIN for macOS device must be 6 digits long.}

404.description: 1. {5002: Device not found for specified alternate id: id and type: searchBy}

422.description: 1. {5003: Invalid searchby parameter.} 2. {1012: The value of set_recovery_lock.password_policy.length must be between 8 and 64.}

post.summary: New - Executes a command for a device by the device uuid.
post.description: Executes a command for a device by device uuid. Supported commands are SetRecoveryLock (macOS only), DeviceWipe (macOS only), CustomMdmCommand (macOS only).

parameters.name: deviceUuid
parameters.description:
The Device unique identifier.
            Accepted format is **guid**
            E.g. 0258902A-9E0C-4DC5-A997-9E079559F75E(Required).

parameters.name: commandName
parameters.description: The name of the command to execute. Supported command types [SetRecoveryLock, DeviceWipe, CustomMdmCommand, CancelPendingWipe].(Required).

400.description: 1. {6213: Device is not enrolled.} 2. {5101: Command not found for the input device and command type.} 3. {5102: Command is not supported.} 4. {5287: Either the command request or the password policy is empty for SetRecoveryLock. } 5. {5291: Invalid obliteration behavior value.} 6. {5292: PIN for macOS device must be 6 digits long.} 7. {5104: Command XML cannot be null or empty.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {5002: Device not found for specified uuid: deviceUuid.}

422.description: 1. {1012: The value of set_recovery_lock.password_policy.length must be between 8 and 64.}

post.description: This API is for executing actions on give set of devices.

400.description: 1. {5138: Feature is currently turned off}  3. {5139: Admin action cannot be performed on more than {0} number of devices in one go.}

403.description: Forbidden 4. { 8168: Admin action is not allowed for {0} Devices under the organization group {0}. }

422.description: UnprocessableEntity 1.{6070 : Required parameters for actions are missing.}

get.summary: New - Searches the device using the query information provided.
get.description: Get basic information about the device with maximum pagesize limit of 500. If page size is greater than the maximum limit, it will return the first 500 records.

parameters.name: model_identifier
parameters.description: Partial search by device model. Search by MD20 would return device with model MD200LL.

parameters.name: device_type
parameters.description: Device platform type, i.e. Apple, Android, WindowsPC, etc.

parameters.name: organization_group_uuid
parameters.description: Organization Group to be searched. User's OG is considered if not specified.

parameters.name: seen_since
parameters.description: Specifies the date filter for device search, which retrieves the devices that are seen after this date.

parameters.name: friendly_name
parameters.description: Friendly name of the device to be searched.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specific page number to get. 0 based index.

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sorting order. Values ASC or DESC. Defaults to ASC.

404.description: 1. {6: Organization Group with id :{} not found or Admin user does not have access to it}

get.summary: New - Get basic details about the device.
get.description: Get basic information about the device based on the unique identifier passed in the path. The response contains hypermedia links, which can be followed to get more information about the device.

404.description: 1. {5061: Device not found} 2. {5177: Organization group not found.}

post.description: Register multiple devices and create enrollment tokens.

parameters.name: organizationGroupUuid
parameters.description: Guid of the organisation group for which the upload is being done.(Required).

400.description: Bad Request 1.{1012:Uploaded file is not a CSV or the file is not in the standard format. Please upload a csv file.}

404.description: Not Found   1.{5177: The organization group: {0} was not found.}

post.description:
1. Create a new profile for the provided platform with the specified payloads.
2. For Version 2004, only Windows Defender Payload is supported.

parameters.name: profileEntity
parameters.description: An entity containing the attributes for creating a profile for the windows desktop platform.

401.description: 1. {5905: Resource organization group not found or user does not have access to organization group. }

422.description: {1012 : Unprocessable profile entity please see the error details.}

get.summary: New - Retrieve details of a specific profile
get.description:
1. Returns the full profile details, including all payloads associated with the profile.
2. Only the Windows Defender payload is supported.

401.description:
1. { 5027: Not allowed to access organization group } 
2. { 5910: Insufficient rights to read profile. }

404.description: 1. {5112: Profile not found for this request.}

put.description:
1. If the add_version attribute is empty or false a new Profile version will not be created but AssignedSmartGroups RootLocationGroup AssignedGeofenceArea and AssignedSchedule will be saved and published. 
2. If it is true new version of the profile will be created and published.
3. For Version 2004, only Windows Defender Payload is supported.

parameters.name: profileUuid
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the device profile.

parameters.name: profileEntity
parameters.description: An entity containing the attributes for creating a profile for the windows desktop platform.

401.description: 1. {5905: Resource organization group not found or user does not have access to organization group. }

422.description: {1012 : Unprocessable profile entity please see the error details.}

parameters.name: profileUuid
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the device profile

401.description:
1. {Not allowed to access the organization group} 
2. {5027: No organization group found for the given organization group UUID.}

404.description: 1. {5112: Profile not found for this request.}

get.summary: Get all device profiles as per search filter

parameters.name: sortorder
parameters.description: Sorting order, Values ASC or DESC, Defaults to ASC

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results which should be returned in each request

post.summary: Uploads a completed (already built for device) profile
post.description: For an existing profile in pending state, upload the completed profile for a given device

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Specifies the type of payload wrapped in the CMS body

403.description: 1. { ????: Not allowed to access device }2. { ????: Not allowed to access profile }

404.description: 1. { ????: The specified profile was not found for the requested device }

post.summary: New - Search API to Retrieve a list of profiles.
post.description: Returns a list of profiles based on the search criteria.

400.description: { 5005: Platform name cannot be null when payload name is given.}

404.description: { 5054: No organization group found for the given organization group UUID. }

post.description: Creates a New Tag for a given Organization Group Uuid.

403.description: Forbidden                               {11: User does not have permission to perform this operation.}

404.description: Not Found               1.{6: Organization Group with uuid : {0} not found or Admin user does not have access to it.}

422.description: Unprocessable Entity 1. {1012: Organization uuid is required.} 2. {1012: Tag name cannot be null or empty.} 3. {    1012: Tag name cannot exceed 255 characters}

set_recovery_lock.description: The SetRecoveryLock command options. Must be specified for the request to be accepted for the SetRecoveryLock command. This command is applicable only for macOS 11.5+ and available with Apple Silicon.

device_wipe.description: The DeviceWipe command options. This command is applicable only for macOS devices.

custom_mdm_command.description: The CustomCommandModel command options. This command is applicable only for macOS.

SetRecoveryLockCommandV3Model.description: The SetRecoveryLock command options. Must be specified for the request to be accepted for the SetRecoveryLock command. This command is applicable only for macOS 11.5+ and available with Apple Silicon.

current_password.description: The current recovery lock password set on the device. If provided, will be used for issuing the command to set a new password or clear the existing password. If not provided, the last Applied Password via Workspace ONE UEM will be used.

clear_password.description: If true, ignores the password policy in the request and clears the password set on the device.

password_policy.description: Specifies the complexity of the Recovery Lock password generated and sent to the device as part of the SetRecoveryLock command. If all of include_numbers, include_letters and include_special_characters are false, then the password can contain all the characters.

DeviceWipeCommandV3Model.description: The DeviceWipe command options. This command is applicable only for macOS devices.

wipe_pin.description: The six-character PIN code required for DeviceWipe command.

obliteration_behavior.description: Defines the fallback behavior for erasing a macOS device.

CommandXml.description: Gets or sets the command xml.

DeviceRecoveryLockPasswordPolicyV3Model.description: Specifies the complexity of the Recovery Lock password generated and sent to the device as part of the SetRecoveryLock command. If all of include_numbers, include_letters and include_special_characters are false, then the password can contain all the characters.

length.description: The length of the password that will be generated. The minimum and the maximum length of the password are 8 and 64 respectively.

include_numbers.description: If true, the generated password can contain numbers.

include_letters.description: If true, the generated password can contain letters.

include_special_characters.description: If true, the generated password can contain special characters.

PartialContentRange.description: Gets or sets partial content range.

FileName.description: Gets or sets FileName {Will be set in the content-disposition header}.

AcceptsByteRanges.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets a value which indicates whether a range byte request for a stream is accepted or not.

SendETagHeaderValue.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the option to include ETagHeaderValue.

ResponseDateTimeFormat.description: Gets or sets dateTime format for response.

IRequestQuery.description:
Interface for IAwRequestQuery
This will hold all the required data for a request and will be filled from ModelBinder.

QueryParams.description: Gets or sets Query Parameters. For e.g. any query string parameters will be extracted to key,value pair and stored here.

TenantContext.description: Gets or sets IAwTenantContext. Will hold the tenant details, which will be filled as part of the tenant validation handler.

RequestMethod.description: Gets or sets RequestMethod. Will be used to write custom rules.

AllowedUriQueryChars.description: Gets or sets allowed Characters in Query String.

ITenantContext.description: Contract for TenantContext. Will be exposed from RequestQuery and will be injected to every controller actions and Business method.

TenantCode.description: Gets or sets TenantCode. Uniquely identify the tenant for the request.

OrganizationgroupId.description: Gets or sets Organization Group ID.

errorCode.description: Gets or sets application error code.

message.description: Gets or sets friendly error message.

activityId.description: Gets or sets transactionId of the request.

links.description: Gets or sets list of hypermedia link.

Href.description: Gets or sets hyper text reference.

Title.description: Gets or sets title of the link.

DeviceBulkActionRequestV3Model.description: Model for bulk device action request.

DeviceActionResponseV3Model.description: Defines the response for device bulk actions.

accepted_count.description: The count of actions accepted for processing.

faults.description: The details of the actions failed.

DeviceActionFaultModelV3.description: Defines the fault response for failed actions.

request_item.description: The identifier of the failed action.

message.description: The error message for the failure of action.

DeviceSearchResultExtendedV2.description: Holds the details of response for device search.

devices.description: List of device details retrieved from the search operation.

orphan_devices_details.description: Gets or sets List of device having Faults.

compliance_policy_results.policy_description: Compliance policy for device compromised status including application list contains rule

DeviceExtendedV2.description: Device model that contains all the details for the device

mac_address.description: Gets or sets macaddress of the device.

eas_ids.description: Unique identifiers for devices mail client.

organization_group_name.description: Organization group name the device is enrolled to.

enrollment_user_name.description: Name of the user the device is enrolled under.

enrollment_user_uuid.description: UUID of the user the device is enrolled under.

enrollment_user_email_address.description: E-mail address of the user the device is enrolled under.

last_seen.description: Time the device last reported any status.

last_enrolled_on.description: This gives the Date-Time of last enrollment date.

last_compliance_check_on.description: This gives the Date-time of when the last compliance check was performed.

last_compromised_check_on.description: This gives the Date-time of when the last compromised data was received.

is_remote_management_enabled.description: Remote management enabled status of the device.

data_encryption_yn.description: Data encryption status of the device.

ac_line_status.description: AC line status of the device.

last_system_sample_time.description: Last System Sample time of the device.

is_device_dnd_enabled.description: This gives information about whether the device is in do not disturb mode or not.

is_device_locator_enabled.description: This gives information about whether the device locator is enabled or not.

is_cloud_backup_enabled.description: This gives information about whether the device cloud backup is enabled or not.

is_activation_lock_enabled.description: This gives information about whether the device activation lock is enabled or not.

is_network_tethered.description: This gives information about whether the iOS device is network tethered or not.

battery_level.description: This gives information about the battery level of the iOS device.

last_network_lan_sample_time.description: Last Network LAN Sample time of the device.

last_bluetooth_sample_time.description: Last Bluetooth Sample time of the device.

data_protection_status.description: Data protection status of the user the device belongs to.

processor_architecture.description: Information about the processor Architecture reported by the device.

os_build_version.description: OS build version of the device.

wifi_ssid.description: WiFi SSID the device is connected to.

time_zone.description: Time Zone in Internet Assigned Numbers Authority (IANA) data base name format.

compliance_summary.description: The compliance details of a device including the overall compliance status and a list of MDM compliance policy information.

tenant_uuid.description: Gets or sets the Tenant uuid.

customer_uuid.description: Gets or sets the Customer uuid.

model_id.description: Gets or sets the device model id.

eid.description: Gets or Sets the Embedded Identity Document of the device.

device_mmc.description: Information about Device Mobile Country Code.

is_roaming.description: This gives information about the roaming status of the device.

sim_type.description: Gets or sets the SIM type.

is_enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the SIM is enabled.

provisioned_at.description: Gets or sets provision time of the eSIM.

imei.description: Gets or sets IMEI of the SIM slot.

DeviceComplianceSearchResultV2Model.description: Compliance details of the device given the device ID

compliance_policy_results.description: A list of device compliance policy details and results.

overall_compliance_status.description: Overall compliance status of the device.

DeviceMccV2.description: Information about Device Mobile Country Code.

CompliancePolicyResultModel.description: Detailed MDM compliance policy details and results.

compliance_status.description: The compliance evaluation of the policy.

policy_name.description: The name of the compliance policy for the device.

policy_description.description: The description of the compliance policy.

last_compliance_check.description: The date and time of the last compliance check in UTC.

next_compliance_check.description: The date and time of the next compliance check in UTC.

actions_taken.description: The compliance actions taken on the device due to non-compliance policy evaluation.

ComplianceActionTakenModel1.description: Details of the device compliance action taken on the device.

action_type.description: An enum representing the compliance action.

DeviceResponseV3Model.description: Contains basic details of the device.

total_physical_memory_bytes.description: Total physical memory capacity in bytes.

available_physical_memory_bytes.description: Available physical memory capacity in bytes.

total_external_storage_bytes.description: Total external storage capacity in bytes.

available_external_storage_bytes.description: Available external storage capacity in bytes.

total_internal_storage_bytes.description: Total internal storage capacity in bytes.

available_internal_storage_bytes.description: Available internal storage capacity in bytes.

battery_level_percentage.description: Battery level of the iOS device in percentage.

platform_info.description: Contains basic details about the device platform.

carrier_info.description: Contains carrier details about the device platform.

enrollment_info.description: Contains enrollment details of the device.

os_build_version.description: OS build version of the device.

wifi_ssid.description: WiFi SSID device is connected to.

last_reboot.description: Last reboot time reported by the device in ISO 8601 format.

reboot_pending.description: Whether a reboot is pending for the device.

security_patch_date.description: Security Patch Date reported by the device in ISO 8601 format.

system_update_received_time.description: Pending System Update received time reported in ISO 8601 format.

is_security_patch_update.description: Indicates whether Security Patch Update is true when there is a Security Patch update available.

processor_architecture_name.description: Name of the CPU Architecture the device is using.

supplement_version_extra.description: Gets or Sets the extra part of Supplemental Version.

supplement_build_version.description: Gets or Sets the Supplemental Build Version.

last_evaluation_timestamp.description: Date-Time when the device entitlement evaluation occurred.

windows_user_mode.description: Windows Reassignment User Mode of the device.

power_info.description: Contains basic details about the device power such as battery health.

eid.description: Gets or Sets the Embedded Identity Document of the device.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

PlatformDetailsResponseV3Model.description: Contains model details of the device.

os_version.description: Version of the operating system installed on the device.

DeviceCarrierDetailsResponseV3Model.description: Contains carrier details about the device.

DeviceEnrollmentDetailsResponseV3Model.description: Contains enrollment details of the device.

last_seen_timestamp.description: Date Time when the device last reported any status.

organization_group_name.description: Organization group name where the device is enrolled.

enrollment_user_name.description: Name of the user device is enrolled under.

enrollment_user_uuid.description: UUID of the user device is enrolled under.

enrollment_user_email_address.description: E-mail address of the user the device is enrolled under.

last_checkin_timestamp.description: Date-Time when the device last checked in.

PowerDetailsResponseV3Model.description: Contains basic details about the device power such as battery health.

battery_health.description: Battery health of the iOS device.

EnrollmentTokensResponseV3Model.description: Response model to represent the device enrollment token records.

overall_result.description: Gets or Sets Overall result of processing enrollment tokens.

failed_entries.description: Gets or Sets List of failed enrollment token processing result.

success_entries.description: Gets or sets list of entries that were processed successfully.

error_code.description: Gets or sets Error code for the failure.

message.description: Gets or sets additional information about the failure.

serial_number.description: Gets or sets device serial number.

friendly_name.description: Gets or sets device friendly name.

model_name.description: Gets or sets device model name.

EnrollmentTokenResponseV3BaseModel.description: Base model for enrollment token result.

serial_number.description: Gets or sets device serial number.

friendly_name.description: Gets or sets device friendly name.

model_name.description: Gets or sets device model name.

ProfileV3Entity.description: An entity representing a device profile.

payloads.description: Gets or sets different types for profile payloads.

add_version.description: Gets or sets flag to indicate whether to add a new version during update operation.

allow_removal.description: Gets or sets allow removal type (Always, WithAuthorization, Never).

assigned_schedule.description: Gets or sets assigned time schedule ids.

assignment_type.description: Gets or sets assignment type (Auto, Optional, Compliance).

deployment.description: Gets or sets is managed or not.

description.description: Gets or sets brief description of the profile.

excluded_smart_groups.description: Gets or sets excluded smart groups.

expiration_date.description: Gets or sets expiration date of the profile.

is_active.description: Gets or sets is active or not.

managed_organization_group_uuid.description: Gets or sets managed organization group uuid.

platform.description: Gets or sets platform for profile.

profile_context.description: Gets or sets context of profile (Device, User).

profile_uuid.description: Gets or sets unique identifier for profile.

removal_authorization_password.description: Gets or sets password is required, when allow_removal is WITH_AUTHORIZATION.

BasePayloadV3Entity.description: Contains base proprties for all the payload entities.

type.description: Gets or sets type of payload entity.

ProfileSearchRequestV3Model.description: Request model to search the profiles.

organization_group_uuid.description: Organization group uuid based on which we will search the profiles. If not provided it will search based on Admin Organization group.

configuration_types.description: Profile configuration type, default value DEVICE.

status.description: Profile status, default value ACTIVE, supported value ACTIVE, INACTIVE..

payloads.description:
Payload based on we will search the profile where payload has been configured.
Search is performed based on payload names for all platforms, however search will be performed on basis of GlobalizationKey as well for macOS platform.

search_text.description: Search text based on profile name.

page_size.description: Page size of search result. Default value 20, and maximum value 50.

sort_by.description: Sort by column, currently supported profile name and ModifiedOn.

sort_order.description: Sort order, Currenty suppored ASC and DESC, default value ASC.

ProfilesSearchResultV3Model.description: Model related for profiles search result.

configured_payload.description: List of payloads configured for a profile.

created_by_resource_profile.description: Flag to indicate whether the device profile created during resource profile creation or not.

ProfileSmartGroupV3Model.description: Contains Details of the Smart Group(excluded, assigned) of a profile.

display_key.description: Payload display key used for globalization purpose.

tag_name.description: Gets or sets the Tag Name.

organization_group_uuid.description: Gets or sets the Organization Group Uuid.

tag_uuid.description: Gets or sets the Tag Uuid.
